transcript:
[00:00:00.00] Tracy! We're still trying to rescue Tracy now. She's trapped in the bottom of her house. Her house fell out from under her and now she's trapped.
[00:00:12.00] Tracy, no! Don't worry. Shit. See? You see her in there? She's trapped in there. This is not staged. This is not staged.
[00:00:29.00] Tracy, you're the fucking whole show. I'll get back it. Coming back to the surface now. We'll have to rebuild your cloak, please.
[00:00:38.00] We love you. Come on back now. I miss you so much already, Tracy. Don't give up. Don't give up.
[00:00:49.00] We'll fucking rescue you, Tracy. I'm looking to ranch the love of you.
[00:00:58.00] Fucking pick it up.
